history.content:
<thought>
I am at the top-left open cell facing right. The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The only safe move is to go down, so I should turn right to face downward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the upper-left interior cell facing down. The cell directly ahead is open floor, while turning would not help immediately. Moving forward advances me safely along the left corridor toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, column 2 facing down. The cell directly ahead is safe floor, and there is a clear open corridor downward along this column. Moving forward advances me toward the lower part of the map and toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 4, column 2 facing down. The cell directly ahead is open, while turning would not help immediately. Moving down continues through the safe vertical corridor toward the lower open area, which is likely needed to route around the lava columns toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 5, column 2 facing down. The cell directly ahead is open, and moving downward along the left corridor is the safe path toward the bottom row and then across to the goal on the lower-right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am near the lower-left area facing down, with a wall directly below me, so moving forward is blocked. The open path extends to my right along the row, which is the best direction to start toward the goal in the lower-right area. I should turn to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the left side of an open corridor facing right. The cells ahead on this row are clear for several steps, while moving toward the goal eventually requires going down near the right side. The best immediate move is to advance through the safe corridor.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right and there is a clear corridor ahead. The goal is down and to the right, so advancing along this open path is the best immediate move.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column 4 facing right. The cells to the right are open, but the goal is down and to the far right. A safe route is to continue right along this corridor before turning downward later.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column 5 facing right. The cell directly ahead is safe floor, and moving forward advances me along the open corridor toward the goal in the lower-right area.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right, and the cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward would be unsafe. The open path extends upward from my current position, which leads toward the goal in the lower-right area. I should turn left to face up.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up in a corridor. The cell directly ahead is empty, and moving forward brings me closer to the open path leading toward the goal on the lower-right side.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up, and the cell directly above me is open floor. Moving forward advances me toward the lower-right area where the goal is reachable through the open corridors, while turning is unnecessary right now.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up and there is open space above me, while the goal is down and to the right. The upward path is a dead end near the top wall, so I should first reorient to head right through the open corridor toward the goal side.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right, and the cell directly ahead is open. Moving forward progresses toward the goal on the lower-right side without stepping into lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right toward a wall two cells ahead, and the goal is down and to the right. The cell directly ahead is open, so moving forward brings me closer and lets me turn downward afterward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right at the end of an open corridor, with a wall directly ahead. The goal is below and to the right, so I should first turn to face downward and continue through the open path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am near the right side facing down. The cell directly below me is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. To continue toward the goal at the bottom-right, I should turn left to face right, which leads to a safe path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right at the end of a corridor, so moving forward would hit a wall. The safe open path is upward from here, so I should turn left to face up.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am near the top-right area facing up. The cell directly ahead is a wall, so moving forward is blocked. The goal is below me near the bottom-right, so I should turn to face downward via the shortest safe reorientation.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right at the end of a corridor. The cell directly ahead is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The path upward is open and leads toward the goal row, so I should turn left to face up.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the right side facing up. The cell directly ahead is empty, and moving upward helps me align with the goal row while avoiding lava. So the best next step is to advance.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am near the top-right area, facing up. The cell directly ahead is a wall, so moving forward is blocked. The goal is below and slightly to the right, so I should turn right to face toward the open path on my right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the right side of the third row, facing right. There is a wall directly ahead, so I cannot move forward. The goal is below me near the bottom-right, and the open path continues downward from my position, so I should turn to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the right side facing down. The cell directly below me is safe floor, and moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at the bottom-right corner.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
